title: FizzBuzz to N
prompt: Read a single positive integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 100) from the first command-line argument. Print FizzBuzz from 1 to N inclusive, one value per line, each followed by '\n'. For multiples of 3 print 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 print 'Buzz', for multiples of both print 'FizzBuzz', otherwise print the number.

testCases.name: n15
testCases.expectedStdout:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
